intro_caption:
🎓 Welcome to the Sharda University Admission Bot!
Continue your registration and exam process step by step.
main_menu_title:
🏠 Main menu
Choose a section to continue your Sharda University registration and exam journey:
profile_edit_prompt: 📝 Please enter your registration details again:
profile_edit_blocked: ⛔️ Your exam date has already been assigned. Editing your registration data is no longer available.
reminder_30m:
⏰ Dear {name},
Your Sharda University exam will start soon. Please check the "Exam" section and be ready on time!
why_choose_sharda_caption: ✨ Why Choose Sharda A truly Global University 🇮🇳 🇺🇿 Sharda is Asia’s only university where students from 80+ countries have experienced a world-class campus life. It has become a vibrant meeting point of cultures, ideas, and opportunities. 🌍 180+ Global Academic Tie-Ups Sharda offers opportunities through partnerships with 180+ global universities, including exchange programmes, research collaboration, and credit transfer. 🏛 The 1st Independent Private University in Uzbekistan 🇺🇿 Sharda is the 1st Independent Private University established under a Presidential Decree to open in Andijan, Uzbekistan. 👩‍🏫 1200+ Faculty from Across the Globe Students learn from distinguished faculty with international experience from the USA, UK, Greece, Singapore, Japan, the Russian Federation, and India.
registered_done:
🎉 Registration completed successfully!
Continue using the main menu:
exam_pending:
⏳ Your exam details have not been assigned yet.
Please wait for the university update.
exam_info_updated_user:
✅ Your exam information has been updated.
Please open the "Exam" section and review the latest details.
admin_menu_title:
🛠 Admin menu
Manage Sharda University applicants and exam details:
admin_only: ⛔️ This section is available to admins only.
admin_edit_not_allowed_online: ⚠️ ONLINE users cannot have an address or map location.
admin_edit_not_allowed_offline: ⚠️ OFFLINE users cannot have a link, login, or password.
coming_soon: 🚧 This feature will be added in the next stage.
admin_user_detail: 👤 Applicant details 🧾 Full name: {name} 📱 Phone: {phone} 🎓 Faculty: {faculty} 🧭 B.Tech track: {track} 🧪 Exam type: {exam_type} 📌 Status: {status} 🕒 Exam time: {dt} 📍 Address: {address} 🔗 Link: {link} 👤 Login: {login} 🔑 Password: {password}
bulk_edit_choose_field: ❓ What details do you want to change in bulk?
bulk_edit_done: ✅ Bulk update completed. Data for {count} users has been changed.
admin_enter_time:
🕒 Enter exam date and time
Format: 14.05.2026 14:30
admin_enter_location:
?? Send the Telegram location (or enter lat,lng).
Example: 41.3111,69.2797
export_no_data: 📭 No data found for the selected filter.
stats_text: 📊 Sharda University statistics 👥 Total registered: {total} 🎓 By faculty: - BBA: {bba} - BSC: {bsc} - BAAE: {baae} - B.Tech: {btech} 🧪 By exam type: - ONLINE: {online} - OFFLINE: {offline} ⏳ Pending: - Exam time missing: {p_time} - Credentials missing: {p_creds} - Address missing: {p_addr} - All pending: {p_all}
add_admin_prompt: Send the telegram_id to grant admin access. Example: 123456789
add_admin_invalid:
❌ Invalid Telegram ID.
Please send digits only.
remove_admin_not_allowed: ⚠️ The super admin cannot be removed
msg_enter_phone:
📱 Send the phone number
Example: +998901234567 or 901234567
bcast_prompt:
📬 Send the post/message here (photo, video, or text — all formats are supported).
I will copy and deliver it to all users.
about_sharda: 🎓 Sharda University Uzbekistan A trusted step toward international education ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Sharda University Uzbekistan is an international private university located in Andijan, offering modern education, a strong academic environment, and global opportunities for students. Established under the Presidential Decree PQ-4278 dated 10 April 2019, the university stands out for its future-focused programs and international academic approach. Key advantages: • modern and in-demand academic programs • international learning environment • opportunity to continue studies at overseas campuses • a strong foundation for career and professional growth “The world is here! Where are you?” ✨ Start building your future with Sharda today.
contact_sharda: 📍 Sharda University Uzbekistan — Contact Information ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🏛 Address: 73, Babur Avenue, Andijan, Uzbekistan, 170100 ☎️ Phone numbers: • +998 90 527 12 34 • +998 90 529 12 34 • +998 95 420 09 09 📧 Email: Contact via email 🌐 Official website: Official Sharda University Uzbekistan website 📱 Social media: • Telegram • Instagram • Facebook • YouTube ℹ️ Contact us for more information about admissions, programs, and student life.
faculty_info_sharda: 📘 Sharda University Uzbekistan — Academic Programs Bachelor’s and Master’s programs ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🎓 Bachelor’s programs: • Computer Science and Engineering Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Information Technologies, Cyber Security Tuition: 20,240,000 UZS • Business Administration International Business Tuition: 18,975,000 UZS • Economics and Finance Tuition: 18,469,000 UZS • Applied English Tuition: 17,710,000 UZS 🎓 Master’s programs: • Master of Business Administration Tuition: 15,180,000 UZS • Master of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering Tuition: 13,915,000 UZS ✨ Modern education, career-oriented programs, and international opportunities — all in one place.
